title: strongylodon elmeri
intro: Strongylodon elmeri is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae, commonly known as the Manila bean or ipil. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating gastrointestinal problems. Strongylodon elmeri is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or topical paste for its herbal remedies.
